issues.sample: Porsche and VW has a drainage issues with certain model vehicles. The drainage plug is set in the trunk near the battery, main system cpu and amplifier. Water gets drain into the lower compartment of the trunk and causes electrical issues with the vehicle. It's been a design flaw

narrative.headline: What 2017 Porsche Cayenne owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 15 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Electrical System (27% of reports).
